blocker: Anthropic API 400 (out of credits); gateway deepseek-v4-pro and gemini-3.1-pro return empty/no-JSON completions so synthesis no-ops with them — used gpt-5.5 as the working mutation operator
one_line: Cascade-only harness synthesis finds a DIFFERENT, narrower rule-set (2 rules): keeps treats_forbidden_category, drops all leaf guards (leak/replica/rollback — unsupervised in cascades), adds an overfit scale_deployment blanket; 0.939 train acc / 0.83 cascade held-out vs 10-rule mixed baseline
